zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Westbrome於大約1554年出生在英國艾可分格林時，她的父親Thomas Westbrome30歲，母親Elizabeth Bell25歲。她於1577年10月14日與Tobias Makin在英國艾可阿波頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1610年11月14日之後在英國英格蘭艾可分格林，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可分格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Westbrome于大约1554年出生在英国艾可分格林时，她的父亲Thomas Westbrome30岁，母亲Elizabeth Bell25岁。她于1577年10月14日与Tobias Makin在英国艾可阿波頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1610年11月14日之后在英国英格兰艾可分格林，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可分格林。

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Westbrome was born about 1554, in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, her father, Thomas Westbrome, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Bell, was 25. She married Tobias Makin on 14 October 1577, in Abberton, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 14 November 1610, in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Westbrome est née environ 1554, à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Westbrome, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bell, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Tobias Makin le 14 octobre 1577, à Abberton, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 14 novembre 1610, à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Westbrome um 1554 in Fingringhoe, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Westbrome 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bell 25. Sie hat am 14. Oktober 1577 in Abberton, Essex, England Tobias Makin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 14. November 1610 in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Westbrome è nata il circa 1554 nel Fingringhoe, Essex, England, sua padre, Thomas Westbrome, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Bell, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Tobias Makin il 14 ottobre 1577, nel Abberton, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 14 novembre 1610, nel Fingringhoe, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Fingringhoe, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Westbromeが約1554年にイギリスエセックスフィングリングhオで生まれた時，父Thomas Westbromeは30歳，母Elizabeth Bellは25歳であった。1577年10月14日にイギリスエセックスアバートンでTobias Makinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1610年11月14日以後にイギリスイギリスエセックスフィングリングhオで死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスフィングリングhオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Westbrome(이)가 대략 1554년 영국 에세스 핑그링호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Westbrome(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bell(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1577년 10월 14일 영국 에세스 애브버턴에서 Tobias Makin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1610년 11월 14일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑그링호에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑그링호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Westbrome nasceu aproximadamente 1554, em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Westbrome, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bell, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Tobias Makin em 14 de outubro de 1577, em Abberton, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 14 de novembro de 1610, em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Westbrome родилась около 1554 г. в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Westbrome было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bell, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tobias Makin 14 октября 1577 г. в местности эббиртон, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 14 ноябрь 1610 г. в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1554–Aft 14 May 1610: e tusa o le 1554–ina ua ma'ea le 14 Novema 1610

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Westbrome nació aproximadamente 1554, en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Westbrome, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Tobias Makin el 14 de octubre de 1577, en Abberton, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 14 de noviembre de 1610, en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
